name: Tenable.io
description: Monitor Tenable.io vulnerability scans and asset inventory for security compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Tenable.io
2. Go to Settings > My Account > API Keys
3. Generate a new API key pair
4. Copy both the Access Key and Secret Key and paste them below

credentialFields.label: Access Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Tenable.io > Settings > My Account > API Keys

credentialFields.label: Secret Key
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Tenable.io > Settings > My Account > API Keys

checks.name: Secure Code
checks.description: Verifies that Tenable.io vulnerability scans are configured

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies that device assets are tracked in Tenable.io
